note: Image library for the Havruta app. Deployed images live in public/ and ship with the site. Stock images live in assets/images/stock/ and are version-controlled but not deployed until a page uses one (move into public/ when needed). Search by description, tags, or source_prompt. Source images were generated with Nano Banana 2 from the prompts in (Seth's) Downloads/havruta-beit-midrash-image-prompts.md; the original Gemini filenames are kept for provenance.

images.source_prompt: Wide establishing shot of a traditional beit midrash, dozens of pairs studying together, bookshelves of Talmud, warm light.
images.description: A wide, bright study hall full of people learning in pairs at long tables, modern and varied: men in knitted kippot, women in headscarves, a range of ages, animated conversation, tall bookshelves, warm daylight.
images.people: modern and diverse, men and women, knitted kippot and headscarves, no shtreimels or long payot

images.source_prompt: Intimate two-person chavruta over a single folio, one gesturing to press a point, the other about to object, tea and notebook.
images.description: Two young men in light knitted kippot and white shirts at an open folio, one gesturing mid-argument, the other listening and about to respond, a glass of tea on the table.
images.people: two young men, modern orthodox, knitted kippot, no payot

images.source_prompt: Editorial illustration of the classic Talmud page layout as architecture: central text block framed by nested bands of commentary on aged paper; text as decorative calligraphic texture, not real letters.
images.description: An abstract illustration of the tzurat hadaf: a central column of text surrounded by framed bands of smaller text on cream paper, conveying layers of commentary around a core, no people, text is decorative not legible.

images.source_prompt: Close macro of a finger resting on a single line of an old worn page, warm light, slow tactile attentive reading; text out of focus.
images.description: A macro close-up of a finger tracing one line on a worn, soft-edged old page in warm light, the rest of the text out of focus. A small decorative sparkle artifact sits at the lower right.

images.source_prompt: An older scholar and a young learner studying together across a table of books, the elder explaining, suggesting Torah handed across generations.
images.description: An older bearded man in a kippah explaining to a young learner across a small table with open books and tea, warm light, the handing-on of learning between generations.
images.people: older man and young man, modern kippot, no payot

images.source_prompt: Intimate two-person chavruta over a single folio, one gesturing, the other about to object, tea.
images.description: Two young men in black velvet kippot and white shirts at an open folio, one gesturing to make a point, the other listening, a glass of tea. A more yeshivish variant of the deployed chavruta image.
images.people: two young men, yeshivish, black velvet kippot

images.source_prompt: Editorial illustration of the Talmud page layout as architecture, with a decorative title band at the top.
images.description: An abstract tzurat hadaf illustration like the deployed one, but with a decorative Hebrew-style title band across the top, cream paper. The title is decorative texture, not real letters.

images.source_prompt: Intimate two-person chavruta over a book (rendered here as two women), study hall behind.
images.description: Two women studying together at a table, one in a headscarf, both leaning over an open book, a busy study hall behind them. A strong inclusive image showing women learning. High value for a who-studies or inclusivity section.
images.people: two women, modern, one in a headscarf, inclusive

images.source_prompt: Close on an open Talmud volume in warm light, the page filling the frame, a hand at the edge.
images.description: Hands holding a large open Talmud volume, the page filling the frame in warm lamplight, the layout reading like a real daf. Good for a page or book header. Text is decorative, not legible.

images.source_prompt: Wide shot of a study hall conveying the sound and motion of learning, many pairs, energy.
images.description: A wide traditional yeshiva study hall, rows of young men in white shirts and dark kippot studying, a large open book in the foreground. A more traditional and homogeneous look; hold for a context where that is the right register.
images.people: many young men, traditional, dark kippot, all male
